sections.content:

<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check the new green block
seg = current_frame.segmentation

    print(f"  boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check the top-right area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nTop-right area (rows 12-18, cols 48-54):")
for r in range(12, 19):
    print(f"  r{r}: {ascii_lines[r][48:54]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
